name: apple-agent-kit
description: Proof-driven automation patterns for macOS and iOS app work with coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: macOS and iOS automation playbooks for coding agents.
interface.longDescription: Reusable Codex skills, templates, scripts, and evidence conventions for building, testing, and auditing Apple apps with coding agents and CI.
defaultPrompt: Inspect this Apple app repo and recommend automation setup.
Add proof-driven macOS CI for this app.
Prepare an iOS physical-device smoke test.
